race.description: Clayton's Towing Service Qtis 3YO Maiden Handicap
race.comment: DON'T DOUBT MISSY (7) has just run into one better at the past couple of outings and this is not an overly strong affair. Gets 2kg off with the claim and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be featuring in the finish. EMPHATIQUE (8) has placed three of four this time in work and has placed on all going. Expected to be prominent. PRIZE WITNESS (10) brings NSW formlines to the table and must be respected out of the Lees camp. Include with the claim from the low draw. CLIVE'S GLORY (5) placed over this distance range when resuming and will have come on with that run now in the locker. Include in calculations. CERTIFY (3) rounds out the selections in a race with only a handful of chances.
